title: Supercomputing Systems
description: As Big Data, UHD/FHD, and Simulation demands grow, HPC requirements are increasing across government, academia, and research labs. High Density Compute Accelerators deliver differentiated HPC through GPU-based processing.

products.name: 1U 5500/5600-Series Server
features: CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch longIncludes PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply

products.name: Expansion Optimized Server
features: uCUBE desktop enclosure supports one full-height I/O card up to 9.55 inch longIncludes PCIe cable adapter/cable and 84W external power supply

products.name: FlashCUBE
features: CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch long with PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply
